description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box labeled 'Beovu 120 mg/ml', a solution for injection in a pre-filled syringe containing brolucizumab. The box is predominantly white with green and purple accents, and features clear pharmaceutical branding and dosage information on the front. The front panel displays the product name, concentration, usage instructions, and a purple-highlighted section indicating the single dose volume. The Novartis logo is present in the lower left corner, and the box has a clean, professional appearance typical of prescription medication packaging. The sides of the box are plain with some continuation of the green design and text. The overall construction suggests it is designed to securely contain and protect the pre-filled syringe inside.
description: A white and green rectangular box labeled 'Beovu 120 mg/ml', designed for containing a pre-filled syringe of injectable medicine. The packaging features clear pharmaceutical branding and dosage information.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full product name, dosage, instructions, and Novartis logo with green and purple design elements.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing the box's depth and partial side panel with some text and green accent visible.
description_view_2: Top-down front view emphasizing the main label and the box's rectangular shape, with all key information visible.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite direction, showing the other side panel and the continuation of the green design.
attribute_label_text: Beovu 120 mg/ml solution for injection in pre-filled syringe brolucizumab Intravitreal use 1x 0.165ml pre-filled syringe Single dose: 6mg/0.05ml. Excess volume to be expelled. NOVARTIS
attribute_brand_logo: purple and green stylized cross with dots
